Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Izyrian]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Gladiators are almost always descended from the light-haired Izyrian tribes.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — Izyrians are a people mentioned in the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Shera might have had Izyrian ancestry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Calder Marten is of Izyrian heritage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — The man in the House of the Masons has the pale skin of an Izyrian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — There is a Soulbound on Clayborn's crew who is a former Izyrian gladiator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — An Izyrian redhead is one of the men Shera fights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — An Izyrian broke Meia's rock missile in midair.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
